=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (7:24-7:45) TS377042: This code uses `instanceof` with an Effect Schema type. `Schema.is` is the schema-aware runtime check for this case. effect(instanceOfSchema)
  Fix 0: "Disable instanceOfSchema for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable instanceOfSchema for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace with Schema.is"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable instanceOfSchema for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable instanceOfSchema for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 2: "Replace with Schema.is" ===

--- file:///.src/instanceOfSchema_preview.ts ---
// @effect-diagnostics *:off
// @effect-diagnostics instanceOfSchema:warning
import { Schema } from "effect"

class User extends Schema.Class<User>("User")({ name: Schema.String }) {}
declare const value: unknown
export const preview = Schema.is(User)(value)
